name: @chbrain/khai-engine-implementation-intention
description: khai implementation-intention engine — the if-then plan that bridges a goal intention to its execution
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The if-then plan that bridges a goal intention to its execution.

card.wire: Link the implementation-intention phase the persona is in (planning, triggering, or executing) under Projection.
card.issue: The gap between the persona's intention to act and their actual action -- what they intend to do and what consistently fails to happen.
card.require: A goal intention that the persona holds but has not yet translated into reliable action; the implementation intention bridges the intention-behavior gap.
card.enforce: An implementation intention is not a plan in the general sense. It is a specific if-then format: when situation X occurs, I will do Y. The specificity is the mechanism; vague plans do not have the same effect.
card.setup: Name the goal intention, the critical situation (when X), the specific action response (I will do Y), and what has previously prevented the persona from acting on the intention.
